zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucy Hutchinson於1738年3月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德賀布隆時，她的父親Moses Hutchinson41歲，母親Irene Mattoon48歲。她於大約1754年與Cunningham- Kinnikim在美國康乃狄克州托藍德賀布隆吉列亞德結婚。她於1738年住在美國康乃狄克州托藍德賀布隆。她去世於大約1806年在美國紐約州奧瑟格武納迪拉亞武納迪拉亞享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lucy Hutchinson于1738年3月25日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州哈特福德賀布隆时，她的父亲Moses Hutchinson41岁，母亲Irene Mattoon48岁。她于大约1754年与Cunningham- Kinnikim在美国康涅狄格州托藍德賀布隆吉列亞德结婚。她于1738年住在美国康涅狄格州托藍德賀布隆。她去世于大约1806年在美国纽约州奧瑟格武納迪拉亞武納迪拉亞享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Hutchinson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern): patronymic from the Old French personal name Hucheon (see Houchin ) + -son.
Irish: in Ireland and Scotland, adopted for Mac Uisdein and Mac Uistin; see McCutcheon .

History: Anne Marbury Hutchinson (1591–1643) and her husband William came from Lincolnshire, England, to MA in 1634. A religious dissident, she led the first attack on the Puritans and was banished from the Massachusetts Bay Colony. She moved to RI in 1638, and, after her husband's death in 1642, settled in NY, where the Hutchinson River was named in her honor. Ironically, the Hutchinson name stayed on in MA and one of her descendants, Thomas Hutchinson (1711–80), was royal governor of Massachusetts Bay Colony.

variants.name: Houchin
meanings: English (Essex): of Norman origin, from the Old French personal name Huchon, a double diminutive of Hue (see Hugh ) common in Picardy, corresponding to Old French Hueçon, Huesson, modern French Husson. This was used as a personal name in Scotland, where it also became a surname and was adopted in Gaelic as Huisdean or Uisdean; see McCutcheon and compare Hutch .

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.description: Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.
Bill of Rights guarantees individual freedom.
Historical Boundaries 1791: Otsego, New York, United States

en.lifeSummary: When Lucy Hutchinson was born on 25 March 1738, in Hebron, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, her father, Moses Hutchinson, was 41 and her mother, Irene Mattoon, was 48. She married Cunningham- Kinnikim about 1754, in Gilead, Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, United States. She lived in Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, United States in 1738. She died about 1806, in Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, New York, United States, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lucy Hutchinson est née le 25 mars 1738, à Hebron, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Moses Hutchinson, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Irene Mattoon, avait 48 ans. Elle a épousé Cunningham- Kinnikim environ 1754, à Gilead, Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis. Elle a vécu à Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, États-Unis en 1738. Elle est décédée environ 1806, à Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, New York, États-Unis, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lucy Hutchinson am 25. März 1738 in Hebron, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Moses Hutchinson 41 und ihre Mutter Irene Mattoon 48. Sie hat um 1754 in Gilead, Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten Cunningham- Kinnikim geheiratet. 1738 hat sie in Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Sie starb um 1806 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, New York, Vereinigte Staaten.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Hutchinson è nata il il 25 marzo 1738 nel Hebron, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, sua padre, Moses Hutchinson, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Irene Mattoon, aveva 48 anni. Lei sposato Cunningham- Kinnikim circa 1754, nel Gilead, Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Vissuto a Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1738. Morì circa 1806, nel Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, New York, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Hutchinsonが1738年3月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ハートフォードヘブロンで生まれた時，父Moses Hutchinsonは41歳，母Irene Mattoonは48歳であった。約1754年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドヘブロンギレアドでCunningham- Kinnikimと結婚した。彼女は1738年にはアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州トランドヘブロンに住んでいた。彼女は約1806年にアメリカ合衆国ニューヨーク州オトセゴウナデラウナデラで69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Hutchinson(이)가 1738년 3월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 브런에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Moses Hutchinson(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Irene Mattoon(은)는 48세였다. 그녀는 대략 1754년 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 브런 길이드에서 Cunningham- Kinnikim(와)과 결혼했다. 1738년도에 미국 코네티컷 주 톨랜드 브런에서 살았다. 그녀는 대략 1806년 미국 뉴욕 주 츠고 우나디라 우나디라에서 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lucy Hutchinson nasceu em 25 de março de 1738, em Hebron, Hartford, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Moses Hutchinson, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Irene Mattoon, tinha 48 anos. Ela casou-se com Cunningham- Kinnikim aproximadamente 1754, em Gilead, Hebron, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Ela viveu em Hebron, Tolland, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América em 1738. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1806, em Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, Nova Iorque, Estados Unidos da América, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucy Hutchinson родилась 25 марта 1738 г. в местности хеброн, хартфорд, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Moses Hutchinson было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Irene Mattoon, 48. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Cunningham- Kinnikim около 1754 г. в местности джилид, хеброн, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Она жила в местности хеброн, толланд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в 1738 году. Она умерла около 1806 г. в местности унадилла, унадилла, оцего, Нью-Йорк, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lucy Hutchinson nació el 25 de marzo de 1738, en Hebron, Hartford, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, su papá, Moses Hutchinson, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Irene Mattoon, tenía 48 años. Se casó con Cunningham- Kinnikim aproximadamente 1754, en Gilead, Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Vivió en Hebron, Tolland, Connecticut, Estados Unidos en 1738. Murió aproximadamente 1806, en Unadilla, Unadilla, Otsego, Nueva York, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 69 años.
